hero.lead: We connect leaders, companies, and institutions across Ibero-America and the United States to foster business cooperation and open new markets.
about.lead: AIRE is an organization registered in Florida, U.S.A., in the process of qualifying as a non-profit association. It was created to promote the common interests of its members through business integration, public-private cooperation, and the articulation of ecosystems between Ibero-America and the United States.
about.purpose: To consolidate an Ibero-American network of economic leadership that enables business cooperation, reduces barriers to entering new markets, and promotes sustainable and competitive projects.
about.mission: To design and operate an agile, reliable, and collaborative organization that brings together leaders by industry, articulates public-private collaboration, and turns ideas into concrete initiatives.
about.vision: To be the Ibero-American institutional benchmark in business diplomacy and economic cooperation, with real impact on productive integration between Ibero-America and the United States.
values.title: Our values
values.subtitle: The principles that guide every action at AIRE.
values.integrity: We act with integrity, transparency, and responsibility.
values.collaboration: Working together as a driver of development.
values.innovation: We promote new ideas that enhance competitiveness.
values.diversity: Diversity of perspectives as a strength.
services.title.prefix: We bring stakeholders together, structure agendas, and promote
services.lead: AIRE operates as an institutional platform that connects sectoral and cross-cutting capabilities to support initiatives linked to development and international expansion.
services.card1.title: Sector and public-private roundtables
services.card1.text: Strategic dialogue spaces to analyze shared challenges, identify opportunities, and generate joint action proposals.
services.card2.title: Institutional linkage roundtables and networking.
services.card2.text: Coordination spaces that promote the exchange of best practices and sector cooperation among key stakeholders.
services.card3.title: Project design and management
services.card3.text: Institutional support for international expansion initiatives, investment, inter-company cooperation, and sector development.
services.card4.title: Briefs, studies, and sector radars
services.card4.text: Strategic content oriented to decision-making, developed with an applied and multi-sector perspective.
services.card5.title: AIRE Academy
services.card5.text: Programs, workshops, and training aimed at business leaders, with a focus on internationalization, management, and innovation.
services.card6.title: Strategic consultations
services.card6.text: Strategic guidance spaces for members, channeled through specialized Sector Directorates.
memberships.lead: Being part of AIRE means joining an Ibero-American network of companies and leaders who share a strategic, institutional, long-term perspective.
plans.standard.name: Corporate Standard
plans.standard.desc: For organizations that want to actively integrate into the AIRE ecosystem.
plans.standard.item1: Preferred access to events and sector roundtables
plans.standard.item2: Presence in the institutional member directory
plans.standard.item3: Participation as an observer in sector roundtables
plans.standard.item4: Access to 1 institutional sector strategic orientation session.
plans.standard.item6: Institutional content: briefs and opportunity radar
plans.premium.name: Corporate Premium
plans.premium.desc: A higher level of institutional and strategic involvement.
plans.premium.item2: Prominent institutional participation in industry forums.
plans.premium.item4: Greater visibility in communications and events
plans.premium.item5: Expanded access to sector dialogue instances
plans.strategic.name: AIRE Strategic
plans.strategic.desc: An active institutional role, supporting long-term development.
contact.lead: If you'd like to learn more about the Association, explore a membership, propose an institutional partnership, or make a general inquiry, please contact our team.

footer.legal: AIRE is a nonprofit organization registered in Florida as a Business League, dedicated to promoting the common interests of its members and strengthening the Ibero-American business ecosystem.
